subject: In London
body:
I am standing in front of my hotel 
The other pictures I am in front of our office building at our port London Gateway headquarters I am holding a board meeting today and tomorrow I fly to Rotterdam 
To visit our Rotterdam Gateway port

















Sent from my iPhone
